arguments.title: Truck Breakdown – Load FH-2026-001
arguments.description: Driver reported truck broke down and is waiting on roadside repair while en route to delivery at 456 Delivery St, Dock 4, Dallas, TX 75201. Delivery appointment is 2026-05-11T20:00:00Z (3:00 PM CT). Breakdown reported at 2026-05-11T17:15:00Z UTC. Delivery delay is likely. Operations team should assess impact and coordinate with carrier/dispatcher as needed.

arguments.message: Got it — our team has been notified and will review. Stay safe out there.
